formDescription: California Request for Live Scan Service form used to collect agency, applicant, and submission details for fingerprint background check processing.

questions.explanation: Enter the ORI code assigned by the DOJ for the agency requesting the live scan.

questions.text: What is the authorized applicant type?
questions.explanation: Enter the applicant type authorized for this live scan request, as provided by the requesting agency.

questions.text: What license or working title applies?
questions.explanation: Enter the license, certification, permit, or working title for this submission. If the DOJ assigned an exact title, use that exact wording.

questions.text: What agency may receive the records?
questions.explanation: Enter the full name of the agency authorized to receive the criminal record information from this live scan.

questions.text: What is the agency Mail Code?
questions.explanation: Enter the five-digit Mail Code assigned by the DOJ for the agency receiving the records.
Enter the complete mailing address for the agency authorized to receive the records.
Enter the contact person for the requesting agency. This is mandatory for school submissions.

questions.text: What is the agency contact phone number?
questions.explanation: Enter the telephone number for the agency contact person listed on this form.
Enter your legal name exactly as it should appear on the live scan request.
Choose Yes if you have used another legal name, AKA, maiden name, or alias.

autopopulate.profileDescription: Whether the user has used another name or alias

questions.explanation: Enter the other name you have used, including first name, last name, and suffix if any.

questions.text: What is your date of birth?
questions.explanation: Enter your birth date as it appears on your official identification documents.
Select the option that best describes your sex as required on the official form.

questions.text: What is your driver's license number?
questions.explanation: Enter the driver's license number from your current government-issued identification.
Enter your height in the format requested by the live scan agency, such as feet and inches.
Enter your current weight in pounds as required for the live scan request.
Select the eye color that best matches your official identification record.
Select the hair color that best matches your current appearance or official identification record.

questions.text: What is your place of birth?
questions.explanation: Enter the state or country where you were born, as requested on the official form.
Enter your Social Security number if it is required for this live scan submission.

questions.text: What is your other identification number?
questions.explanation: Enter any other identification number requested by the agency for this applicant submission.
Enter your complete home address including street, city, state, and ZIP code as it should appear on the form.

textboxes.label: Home Street Address or P.O. Box

questions.text: What is the applicant signature date?
questions.explanation: This date will be filled automatically with today's date when you submit the form.

questions.text: What is the agency billing number?
questions.explanation: Enter the billing number provided by the agency for this live scan transaction, if one applies.
Enter the agency identifying number, often called the OCA number, if the requesting agency provided one.

questions.text: Please select your level of service
questions.explanation: Select each level of background check service requested by the agency for this submission.
Choose Yes if you are resubmitting a prior live scan and need to provide the original ATI number.

questions.text: What is your original ATI number?
questions.explanation: Enter the ATI number from your original live scan submission and be prepared to provide proof of rejection.
Choose Yes if the requesting agency or statute requires an employer response section for this live scan.
Enter the employer name only if this additional response section is required for your submission.
Enter the employer's complete mailing address including street, city, state, and ZIP code.

questions.text: What is the employer phone number?
questions.explanation: Enter the employer telephone number if it is available for this additional response section.

questions.text: What is the employer Mail Code?
questions.explanation: Enter the five-digit DOJ Mail Code for the employer, if the agency requires one.
